widgets_values: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles, distorted, disfigured, extra objects, missing elements, inconsistent motion, text not followed, ignored prompt

default_dtype=float32
multistep_fallback_sampler=ddim
multistep_extra_initial_steps=0
skip_final_model_call
no_batch_loop
self_refine_mask_preview
self_refine_debug

nodes.title: Simple prompt
widgets_values: A girl stands on a basketball court with a basketball as the camera arcs around her counter clockwise and stops, showing her full-length from the front. After that The girl takes the basketball with both hands and cheerfully says, "This time I definitely won't miss!".
